title: +15% this week ~$8.4k   these momentum setups have been paying lately
author: Rude-Anywhere2712
selftext:
Finished the week up about +15% (\~$8.4k), mostly trading momentum and breakout setups.

What I’ve been focusing on:  
  
Pre-market Top Gainers with volume building early  
  
Stocks holding above VWAP after open  
  
Clean breakouts after consolidation (no chasing extended moves)  
  
Quick cuts if momentum fades

I’m not holding anything long  most of these are short-term trades, just riding momentum and getting out.

I have personally compiled a set of strategies and methods for analyzing market trends and shared them in my group. If you are interested, please leave a comment or contact me directly. I hope to do my utmost to assist those who can truly benefit from this guidance.

comments.author: Beautiful_Bit309
comments.body: So, are you using AI tools to scan for momentum?
